description_long: This obelisk features a tall, slender, four-sided spire rising from a circular base, richly decorated with colorful mosaic patterns and historical imagery. The shaft is adorned with portraits and scenes commemorating women's suffrage, including banners reading 'OUR VOTE', 'OUR FUTURE', and 'VOTES FOR WOMEN', as well as the year '1920'. The base is divided into three distinct color sections—white, yellow, and purple—each covered with small, intricate motifs and bordered by a band of framed symbols. The obelisk's tip is pointed and capped with a golden section, enhancing its prominence. The entire structure is visually striking, with a blend of historical references and artistic ornamentation, making it a focal point in any urban setting. The surface appears to be made of painted or printed material, possibly ceramic or composite, with a matte, slightly rough finish.
description: A colorful, mosaic-decorated obelisk with historical suffrage imagery and a circular, patterned base. The spire is topped with a golden tip and features detailed portraits and banners.
description_view_0: This view highlights the purple section of the base and a large portrait with the text 'OUR VOTE', along with a group of figures and decorative motifs.
description_view_1: The front view shows the white section of the base, a prominent '2020' banner, and portraits of diverse women with the text 'OUR FUTURE OUR VOTE'.
description_view_2: This side displays the yellow section of the base and a portrait of a woman holding a 'VOTES FOR WOMEN' banner, with the year '1920' above.
description_view_3: This angle reveals the transition between the yellow and purple base sections, with visible mosaic patterns and partial views of the portraits and banners.
attribute_inscription: Visible inscriptions include 'OUR VOTE', 'OUR FUTURE', '2020', and 'VOTES FOR WOMEN', located on the shaft in bold, legible, black and white text. The style is clear and modern, with all text in English.
attribute_ornamentation: The obelisk is richly ornamented with mosaic portraits, banners, and small decorative motifs covering the shaft and base. The style is illustrative and commemorative, with historical and symbolic imagery.
attribute_base_design: The base is circular and divided into three colored sections (purple, white, yellow), each covered with small mosaic motifs and bordered by a band of framed symbols. The base is flat and slightly raised.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed and capped with a golden section, smooth and unadorned except for its color, providing a visual accent to the spire.
